content:
The Artist: Toco Deco

Toco Deco is a Latin American artist celebrated for her experimental, minimalist, and expressive artwork. With a Master of Fine Arts degree, she delves into liminal spaces, navigating the intersection of genres and mediums. Her creations often blend digital and traditional techniques, resulting in pieces that challenge conventional boundaries and invite viewers to explore the depths of abstraction and minimalism.

https://videos.files.wordpress.com/cB8cVFjT/tocodeco.mp4

"I combine elements of classical and modernist traditions with new, innovative techniques, technologies, and concepts."

Toco Deco

The Collection: Halcyon

Halcyon is described as a happy and peaceful time in the past that is remembered as being better than today. Does AI have its own youthful memories of the halcyon days of silicon? What might they look like when recalling with fondness those early 1's and 0's? 

"Andromeda, chained on a rocky shore as sacrifice to a sea monster, caught Perseus's eye."

Toco Deco

A Specific Artwork: Beyond The Horizon

The skeletal structure was hand drawn and then the colouring up augmented through the machine learnt ways of the machine. There is something spirited in this piece.

"Elegant transitions of blue, white, orange, and black converge upon the plane, blending together in a choreography of hues and delicate lines. The interplay between the line-work and an undulating composition unfurls a visual narrative with profound fluidity. Within this symphony of aesthetics, a seamless fusion of colors, lines, and textures harmonize, weaving a tapestry evoking a transcendent connection with the artwork's beauty.:

Toco Deco
TOCO DECO | Line 731
